data.title: Arizona Copper and Gold Inc. and Core Nickel Corp. Announce $10 Million Financing for Strategic Merger
data.description:
Core Nickel Corp. ( (TSE:CNCO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Arizona Copper and Gold Inc. and Core Nickel Corp. have announced a brokered private placement to raise up to $10 million in connection with a reverse takeover of Core by Arizona Copper and Gold. The transaction will result in the formation of Arizona Eagle Mining Corp., which will continue the business operations of ACG. The financing involves subscription receipts that will convert into shares and warrants, with the proceeds supporting the merger and future growth. This strategic move is expected to strengthen the companies’ position in the mining industry and provide new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Core Nickel Corp.

Core Nickel Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on nickel resources, while Arizona Copper and Gold Inc. specializes in copper and gold mining. Both companies are involved in mineral exploration and development, aiming to enhance their market presence in the mining sector.

Average Trading Volume: 48,796

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Learn more about CNCO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Baillie Gifford European Growth Trust Acquires Own Shares
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Baillie Gifford European Growth Trust PLC GBP ( (GB:BGEU) ).

Baillie Gifford European Growth Trust PLC has announced the purchase of 140,000 of its own ordinary shares at a price of 106.50p, which will be held in Treasury. This transaction affects the total number of shares available for public trading, now standing at 324,442,867, and is relevant for shareholders in determining their interest under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

data.title: Australian Oilseeds Secures Nasdaq Listing Extension with Compliance
data.description:
Australian Oilseeds Holdings ( (COOT) ) has issued an update.

On August 22, 2025, Australian Oilseeds Holdings Limited received an extension from the Nasdaq Hearings Panel to maintain its listing on Nasdaq, contingent on meeting specific compliance requirements. By September 30, 2025, the company demonstrated compliance with Nasdaq’s Equity Rule by filing an interim balance sheet showing shareholder equity exceeding the minimum requirement, thus securing its continued listing.

data.title: Funding Circle Executes Share Buy-Back to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Funding Circle Holdings ( (GB:FCH) ) has shared an update.

Funding Circle Holdings plc announced the purchase and cancellation of 103,499 ordinary shares as part of its share buy-back program. This transaction, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, is part of a strategy to optimize the company’s capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of shares in circulation.

data.title: Maven Income & Growth VCT Launches £50 Million Subscription Offer
data.description:
Maven Income and Growth VCT ( (GB:MIG1) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Maven Income and Growth VCT PLC, along with its associated companies, has launched a subscription offer to raise up to £50 million through the issuance of new ordinary shares. The offer is contingent upon shareholder approval at a general meeting and aims to close by April 2026 for the 2025/26 tax year, with potential extensions. Maven Capital Partners UK LLP will manage the offer, receiving a fee for its services, which is considered a fair transaction by the board.

data.title: Mink Ventures Upsizes Private Placement to $1 Million
data.description:
Mink Ventures Corp. ( (TSE:MINK) ) has issued an update.

Mink Ventures Corporation has announced an increase in its previously announced private placement from $500,000 to $1,000,000 due to strong investor demand. The funds raised will be used for the exploration and advancement of its Montcalm and Warren projects, as well as for general working capital. The offering, consisting of hard dollar and flow-through units, is subject to customary closing conditions and is expected to close around October 15, 2025.

More about Mink Ventures Corp.

Mink Ventures Corporation is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on exploring critical minerals in Ontario, Canada. The company has a portfolio that includes the Montcalm nickel copper cobalt project and the Warren copper nickel project, both of which are strategically located near existing mining infrastructure and the Timmins Mining Camp.

Average Trading Volume: 17,519

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy
